data.title: The Bank of Greenland has entered into an agreement on the sale of its ownership share of BEC as a part of a total sale to Nykredit. In this regard, the earnings guidance for 2026 is adjusted upwards
data.description: Greenland's bank has finalized a deal to sell its ownership stake in BEC to Nykredit, resulting in an increase in the 2026 earnings forecast.

data.title: Manufacturing Category at 139th Canton Fair Presents Smarter, Lighter and More Connected Solutions
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on April 24, 2026, the 139th Canton Fair showcased the advancements in industrial equipment within the Manufacturing category. The exhibition highlighted the evolving technologies aiming to enhance efficiency, combat labor shortages, and achieve sustainability objectives. Various sectors such as power equipment, machinery, and automation systems presented innovative solutions to address these challenges. The event attracted a significant number of attendees and industry professionals looking to stay abreast of the latest trends in the sector.

data.title: Intel, Procter & Gamble And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures are trading with a mix, indicating a potentially uncertain start for investors on Friday. Charter Communications Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) is anticipated to announce earnings of $10.12 per share on revenue totaling $13.55 billion before the opening bell, according to data from Benzinga Pro. Prior to this announcement, Charter Communications saw a decrease of 0.93% in its shares, dropping to $239.52 in overnight trading. Meanwhile, Intel Corp. (NASDAQ: INTC) surpassed expectations in its first-quarter financial results and provided second-quarter guidance that surpasses estimates. Intel reported earnings of 29 cents per share for the quarter, exceeding the analyst consensus. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Munters wins order of BSEK 2.0 for a modular AI cooling solution
data.description: In Stockholm on April 24, 2026, Munters' Data Center Technologies (DCT) division secured a significant order valued at approximately 2 billion Swedish Krona (BSEK 2.0) from a colocation data center company based in the United States. The order comprises specially tailored, high-capacity CDUs (coolant distribution units) along with over-the-rack solutions.

data.title: Kazakhstan: TotalEnergies Takes Final Investment Decision for Its Giant Wind and BESS Project
data.description: In Paris, TotalEnergies has officially approved and obtained funding for the Mirny onshore wind and Battery Energy Storage System project in Kazakhstan. This project is situated in the southeast region of Kazakhstan and is projected to produce 100 terawatt-hours (TWh) of renewable energy throughout a 25-year period. This amount of electricity will be adequate to provide power to approximately 1 million individuals in Kazakhstan. The generated electricity will be marketed to the Kazakhstani government through a 25-year Power Purchase Agreement.
Bekaert provides an update on the share buyback program and liquidity agreement.

data.title: EXEL Industries reports a 12.1% revenue decline in Q2 2025-2026.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the annual inflation rate has risen by 2.5%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. This surge is primarily attributed to the spike in fuel prices, which have jumped by 10% in the past month alone. Additionally, unemployment numbers have dropped by 0.8%, with 250,000 new jobs created in the last quarter. Experts predict this trend to continue in the upcoming months, emphasizing the need for proactive measures to stabilize the economy.

data.title: Egide: postponement of the publication date of its 2025 annual financial statements
data.description: Egide Group has recently decided to delay the release of its 2025 annual financial statements from April 27, 2026. The company has not yet disclosed the new publication date for the financial statements.
